sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96041" key="spondeiotro/xaios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδειοτρόχαιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96041.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a foot consisting of spondee and trochee</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.315</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
